component.name: GlassForge
component.summary: A glassy Linux GUI for Claude Code

description.p: GlassForge is a fast Linux desktop wrapper for the Claude Code CLI. It runs the user's local claude binary inside PTY-backed sessions and surfaces live streaming output, usage tracking, a skills manager, and a runtime-configurable glass theme optimized for KDE Plasma 6.

Fix: acceptEdits mode now correctly prompts for non-edit tools (Read, Bash, etc.) instead of silently denying them in non-interactive sessions. The permission broker is now wired up for both manual and acceptEdits modes, with auto-approval of edit tools in the latter.
